message:
feat(raptorq): context-aware decode_with_context for cancellation + deadline support

- DecodeAdmissionController::decode_with_context() runs decode jobs under
  ExecutionContext cancellation/deadline controls
- Symbols replayed in ascending ESI order for deterministic epoch behavior
- Cooperative yield every 32 symbols via zero-duration sleep for responsiveness
- map_async_error() converts AsyncError → DecodeError (Cancelled/Timeout/Runtime)
- COOPERATIVE_YIELD_INTERVAL constant for tunable yield frequency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
